attributes.title: [Azure Activity Logs OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Platform-level audit logs for Azure Resource Manager control plane operations. Monitor operation volume, verb-level breakdown (WRITE/DELETE/READ/ACTION), failure rates, resource provider activity, top callers by identity, and sensitive operations.

params.markdown:
## [Azure Activity Logs OTel] Overview

This dashboard provides an overview of Azure Activity Log control plane operations:
- Verb-level breakdown (WRITE/DELETE/READ/ACTION) over time
- Operations by resource provider (Key Vault, Network, Storage, etc.)
- Top callers by individual identity (user.name)
- Sensitive operations (listKeys, role assignments, deny assignments)
- Failure rates and resource health status

query.esql:
FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed")
| STATS failed = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed")
| STATS failed = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.result.type NOT IN ("Start", "Started")
| STATS total = COUNT(*), failed = COUNT(*) WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed")
| EVAL failure_rate = CASE(total > 0, TO_DOUBLE(failed) / total, 0.0)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.result.type NOT IN ("Start", "Started")
| STATS total = COUNT(*), failed = COUNT(*) WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed")
| EVAL failure_rate = CASE(total > 0, TO_DOUBLE(failed) / total, 0.0)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Policy"
| WHERE azure.policy.compliance_check == false
| STATS violations = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Policy"
| WHERE azure.policy.compliance_check == false
| STATS violations = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| WHERE azure.resourcehealth.state IN ("Unavailable", "Degraded")
| STATS unhealthy = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| WHERE azure.resourcehealth.state IN ("Unavailable", "Degraded")
| STATS unhealthy = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.incident.type == "Incident"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.state IN ("Active", "Resolved")
| STATS incidents = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.incident.type == "Incident"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.state IN ("Active", "Resolved")
| STATS incidents = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name LIKE "*DELETE*"
| STATS deletes = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name LIKE "*DELETE*"
| STATS deletes = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name LIKE "*LISTKEYS*" OR azure.operation.name LIKE "*ROLEASSIGNMENT*" OR azure.operation.name LIKE "*DENYASSIGNMENT*"
| STATS sensitive = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name LIKE "*LISTKEYS*" OR azure.operation.name LIKE "*ROLEASSIGNMENT*" OR azure.operation.name LIKE "*DENYASSIGNMENT*"
| STATS sensitive = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL verb = CASE(azure.operation.name LIKE "*DELETE*", "DELETE", azure.operation.name LIKE "*WRITE*", "WRITE", azure.operation.name LIKE "*ACTION*", "ACTION", azure.operation.name LIKE "*READ*", "READ", "OTHER")
| STATS op_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), verb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL verb = CASE(azure.operation.name LIKE "*DELETE*", "DELETE", azure.operation.name LIKE "*WRITE*", "WRITE", azure.operation.name LIKE "*ACTION*", "ACTION", azure.operation.name LIKE "*READ*", "READ", "OTHER")
| STATS op_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), verb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), azure.category
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), azure.category
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY azure.category
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY azure.category
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS op_count = COUNT(*) BY azure.operation.name
| SORT op_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS op_count = COUNT(*) BY azure.operation.name
| SORT op_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.type IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.type
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 5

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.type IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.type
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 5

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed")
| STATS failed_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed")
| STATS failed_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL provider = SPLIT(azure.operation.name, "/")
| EVAL provider_name = MV_FIRST(provider)
| STATS op_count = COUNT(*) BY provider_name
| SORT op_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL provider = SPLIT(azure.operation.name, "/")
| EVAL provider_name = MV_FIRST(provider)
| STATS op_count = COUNT(*) BY provider_name
| SORT op_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| EVAL caller = COALESCE(user.name, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.id, "unknown")
| STATS op_count = COUNT(*), failures = COUNT(*) WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed") BY caller, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.type
| SORT op_count DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| EVAL caller = COALESCE(user.name, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.id, "unknown")
| STATS op_count = COUNT(*), failures = COUNT(*) WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed") BY caller, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.type
| SORT op_count DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name LIKE "*DELETE*"
| STATS delete_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name LIKE "*DELETE*"
| STATS delete_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Sensitive Operations (listKeys, Role Assignments, Deny Assignments)

query.esql:
FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name LIKE "*LISTKEYS*" OR azure.operation.name LIKE "*ROLEASSIGNMENT*" OR azure.operation.name LIKE "*DENYASSIGNMENT*"
| EVAL caller = COALESCE(user.email, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.id, "unknown")
| EVAL result_status = CASE(azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed"), "Failed", azure.result.type IN ("Success", "Succeeded", "Accept", "Activated", "Resolved", "Updated", "Active"), "Success", "Other")
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY azure.operation.name, caller, result_status, azure.resource.name
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name LIKE "*LISTKEYS*" OR azure.operation.name LIKE "*ROLEASSIGNMENT*" OR azure.operation.name LIKE "*DENYASSIGNMENT*"
| EVAL caller = COALESCE(user.email, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.id, "unknown")
| EVAL result_status = CASE(azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed"), "Failed", azure.result.type IN ("Success", "Succeeded", "Accept", "Activated", "Resolved", "Updated", "Active"), "Success", "Other")
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY azure.operation.name, caller, result_status, azure.resource.name
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| KEEP @timestamp, azure.category, azure.operation.name, azure.result.type, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.type, user.name, network.peer.address, azure.result.description
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-*
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| KEEP @timestamp, azure.category, azure.operation.name, azure.result.type, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.type, user.name, network.peer.address, azure.result.description
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 100
